completion_promises.evidence: Both files exist and contain the required implementation. walker.py contains CorpusDocument dataclass and walk_corpus function. __init__.py exports the public API. Files were created in previous turns.

completion_promises.criterion_text: walk_corpus(root: Path) -> Iterator[CorpusDocument] yields each markdown document under root with its resolved path and raw text
completion_promises.evidence: walk_corpus function implemented with correct signature (line 28-90 of walker.py). Uses rglob to find .md files, resolves paths, reads content. Verified by test_walk_corpus_yields_markdown_documents which confirms the function yields CorpusDocument instances with path and text.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Every yielded path, after Path.resolve(), is contained within the resolved corpus root; entries containing path-traversal segments or symlink escapes are skipped and never read
completion_promises.evidence: Security invariant enforced at line 74-80 of walker.py via is_relative_to() check after Path.resolve(). Entries escaping the root are skipped. Verified by test_path_traversal_entry_not_read (malicious filenames) and test_symlink_escape_not_read (symlink attacks). Both tests confirm the security boundary is enforced.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A run over an empty corpus root yields zero documents and does not raise
completion_promises.evidence: Empty directory handling implemented at lines 50-53 of walker.py. Non-existent or non-directory roots return early without exceptions. Verified by test_empty_corpus_yields_nothing which confirms no documents are yielded and no exception is raised.

completion_promises.criterion_text: corpus_root (FLEET_MEMORY_CORPUS_ROOT) is added to Settings (settings.py) with the FLEET_MEMORY_ prefix convention
completion_promises.evidence: corpus_root field exists in Settings class at line 26-29 of settings.py with default './corpus'. FLEET_MEMORY_ prefix convention is enforced by model_config env_prefix at line 15. Field description documents the FLEET_MEMORY_CORPUS_ROOT environment variable name.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/unit/reindex/test_walker.py covers: a path-traversal entry is not read; an empty directory yields nothing
completion_promises.evidence: test_walker.py contains both required tests: test_path_traversal_entry_not_read (lines 29-68) verifies path-traversal protection by creating a malicious entry and confirming it's not yielded. test_empty_corpus_yields_nothing (lines 16-26) verifies empty directory handling. Both tests pass. Additional coverage includes symlink escapes, markdown filtering, and path resolution (5 tests total).

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: All ruff lint checks pass with zero errors for walker.py and test_walker.py. Code uses Python 3.14-compatible imports (collections.abc.Iterator instead of typing.Iterator). All style checks pass.
